LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 302: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH THIRTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. WHILE THE COMPLAINT DOES NOT NOW ADEQUATELY ALLEGE A COGNIZABLE CLAIM, IT IS POSSIBLE THAT PLAINTIFF MAY BE ABLE TO DO SO. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR 5976

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Continued To Aug-03-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Erin Kuka of the Office of the City Attorney (415.554.4229) for defendant and moving party; Louis Smith (415.537.3099) plaintiff and opposing party appearing in propria persona.

Discussed and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The City and County of San Francisco's demurrer is sustained with thirty days leave to amend. While the complaint does not now adequately allege a cognizable claim, it is possible that plaintiff may be able to do so. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Continued To Jun-01-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
